cross_review_notes: The alpaca_live 'balance shows but orders unauthorized' paradox resolved: /api/bot/accounts/balances is a connection-free DB snapshot (not a live auth call), so it never proved authorization. The real signal was the order endpoint + the exchange_positions live probe.
Two of my first-pass flags were wrong and are retracted: 'real-money idle' (missed the pre-window-open BTC close) and 'IB gateway wedged' (mgc_trend_1h is execution:shadow by design).
